codeReview.summary: The linker/agent/skill command set is well tested and the macOS/Unix symlink behavior matches the current mission target. I found one portability gap but no blocking bug for the validated environment.

issues.description: The non-Unix implementation hard-errors with "Symlink creation is only supported on Unix systems" instead of creating a Windows junction as described in the design docs. This does not break the current macOS validation, but it means the feature is not actually cross-platform yet.

summary: Pass with a non-blocking portability gap: Windows installs are still unimplemented.
